ham.subject: Update: Company Leave Policy Effective from September 1
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We hope you are doing well. The Human Resources department would like to inform you of a few important updates to our company leave policy that will take effect from September 1, 2024. Please read the details below:

1. Paid Time Off (PTO) Accrual – All full‑time employees will now accrue PTO at a rate of 1.5 days per month, up from the current 1 day.
2. Sick Leave – The company is adding an additional 5 days of paid sick leave per year. These days can be used for personal illness, medical appointments, or to care for a sick family member.
3. Family & Medical Leave – Employees who qualify for FMLA will receive up to 12 weeks of unpaid leave, with the option to convert up to 4 weeks into paid leave under the new policy.
4. Remote Work Days – Employees may now request up to 3 remote work days per month, subject to manager approval.

Please review the attached policy document and complete the acknowledgment form by the end of the week. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to HR@company.com.

Thank you for your attention and continued dedication.

Best regards,

Jane Smith
Human Resources Manager

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

This is an official notice from the IT Security Team regarding your Microsoft 365 account. Our audit has detected that your password will expire in less than 48 hours. Failure to update your password before the expiry date will result in temporary suspension of your account, which could affect your access to essential resources such as emails, SharePoint sites, and OneDrive.

To verify your identity and reset your password, please follow the steps below:
1. Log in to the Microsoft 365 portal at <URL> using your current credentials.
2. Click on the security icon and select "Verify Identity".
3. Answer the security questions and enter your new password.
4. Save the changes and close the portal.

If you do not complete this process by the expiry date, you will lose access to your account until the next maintenance window, which could take up to 72 hours. This action is mandatory to maintain compliance with our security policy.

For any assistance, contact the IT Help Desk at <URL> or call 1-800-123-4567.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,

Michael Thompson
IT Security Lead
